title: Jtech
body:
!['Jtech PVP' in Jtech's font](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/3xInNsaF/images/51b5d1f55748bf8e799284531e61aa926348e00a.png)

JTech is a Minecraft 1.8.9 PVP resource pack designed to stay near the vanilla style unlike most PVP packs.

It contains a new gui inspired by Sam Hogan's Cell Machine, a custom font (example above), a more simplistic block breaking animation, several textures from 1.14+ and sharper swords.
!['Example of Jtech's New Menu's + Some Items](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/3xInNsaF/images/d750aa75ba09c87cd8e36a3ef1a28e922cc516b7.png)
It also has a bit of support for NEU (Not Enough Updates) if you want to use it for skyblock.
!['Example of a bit of NEU support](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/3xInNsaF/images/8fa6fccac877a952095851f2ede629c537915438.png)
Hope You Enjoy It!
